title: Create full-screen canvas shell
summary: All source files, tests, and styles are already in place. The implementation satisfies every acceptance criterion. Tests pass (18/18) and TypeScript compiles without errors.

acceptance_criteria_analysis.evidence: src/visual/scene.ts sets canvas.width = window.innerWidth, canvas.height = window.innerHeight. Tests confirm dimensions match viewport.
src/visual/resize.ts listens for window 'resize' and updates canvas dimensions. Tests confirm resize propagation and cleanup function.
src/style.css sets overflow: hidden on html,body with margin: 0 and padding: 0. Canvas has display: block to prevent inline gaps.

acceptance_criteria_analysis.criterion: Canvas is shown on a dark background
acceptance_criteria_analysis.evidence: CSS sets background: #000. initScene fills canvas with #000000. Render loop clears with #000000.

source.description: Creates canvas element, sizes to viewport, appends to container, fills with black
Attaches window resize listener, updates canvas dimensions, returns cleanup function
Starts requestAnimationFrame loop that clears canvas with black fill
Entry point — imports CSS, initializes scene, attaches resize handler, starts render loop
Full-viewport CSS: zero margin/padding, overflow hidden, dark background, fixed #app container, block canvas

tests.description: 18 tests covering scene init, resize, CSS validation, dark background, render loop, privacy, and main.ts integration

config.description: Vitest config with jsdom environment, globals, and setup file

steps.description: Confirm production build succeeds with no errors
Update ticket status after build verification

notes: Implementation is complete and all acceptance criteria are met. Only remaining steps are build verification and marking the ticket done.
